summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of CRM and Talent Management Platform authentication pages. All core functionality working correctly with excellent French UI implementation.

integration_issues.issue: Login error message shows technical error 'Failed to execute json on Response: body stream already read' instead of user-friendly French message

design_issues.issue: Theme toggle is not accessible on login/register pages - may only be available in dashboard

passed_tests: Login page loads correctly with French UI
Register page loads correctly with French UI
Login form validation works (empty fields, invalid email)
Register form validation works (password mismatch, short password)
Navigation between login and register pages works perfectly
Page routing works - dashboard redirects to login when not authenticated
Root URL redirects to login when not authenticated
All data-testid attributes present for automated testing
Form accessibility - proper labels and tab navigation
Responsive design - works on desktop, tablet, and mobile
Page performance is good (< 2 seconds load time)
Theme system is functional (can toggle programmatically)
action_item_for_main_agent: Improve authentication error messages to show user-friendly French text instead of technical errors. Consider adding theme toggle to login/register pages or make it more discoverable.
